Common.shareTagline: Convert photos to PDF in one click — free!

Landing.heroDescription: Take a photo or upload from your gallery and instantly convert to optimized PDF. No installation needed.
Landing.freeTrialNote: 2 free conversions without sign up • 5 with free account
Landing.localBadge: 100% local processing • Your photos stay on your device
Landing.flowSubtitle: Original photos are never uploaded. Only the final PDF, encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest.
Landing.howSubtitle: Simple, fast and straight to the point
Landing.step1Desc: Open your phone camera or upload an image from gallery right from the browser.
Landing.step2Desc: Conversion happens on your phone, without sending to servers. Fast, private and offline.
Landing.step3Desc: Direct download, send by WhatsApp, Email or SMS. Ready in seconds.
Landing.featureCameraDesc: Capture documents, notes or receipts right from the browser.
Landing.featureInstantDesc: PDF generated locally, fast and without sending data.
Landing.featureMultiPageDesc: Combine multiple photos into a single PDF. Reorder before generating.
Landing.featurePrivacyDesc: Conversion runs in your browser. Original photos never leave your device — GDPR/LGPD compliant.
Landing.featureLanguagesDesc: Available in Portuguese, English, Spanish, Chinese, Hindi and Arabic.
Landing.featureReaderDesc: Open any PDF in browser or on phone. No install required.
Landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need
Landing.readerSectionDesc: Open any PDF directly in browser or phone — no installation needed.
Landing.finalCtaDesc: Start right now, without sign up. It's free, fast and secure.
Landing.helpDesc: Check our frequently asked questions or contact us directly.
Landing.footerTagline: Instant photo to PDF converter. Fast, secure and free.
